reasoning_model_1: The model failed to strictly follow the content instructions. Instead of only saying '请大家注意，会议马上开始了！', it added an extraneous sentence: '声音要大一点，别错过时间' (Voice needs to be a bit louder, don't miss the time). This suggests a hallucination or misinterpretation of the prompt instructions as part of the script. Regarding the target feature '音量' (Volume), the speech is delivered at a standard, conversational volume. While clear, it lacks the projected, high-energy quality associated with 'loud volume' or shouting to get attention. The vocal effort does not sound increased.
reasoning_model_2: The model followed the content instructions perfectly, speaking only the required text: '请大家注意，会议马上开始了'. Regarding the '音量' (Volume) dimension, the model performed exceptionally well. The speaker exhibits clear signs of increased vocal effort, projection, and intensity, effectively simulating a person shouting or speaking very loudly to address a group. The tone and energy are entirely consistent with the command to use a 'loud volume'.
model_comparison: Model 2 is superior in all aspects. First, regarding content accuracy, Model 2 read the text exactly as requested, whereas Model 1 hallucinated additional text ('声音要大一点...'). Second, regarding the specific paralinguistic feature 'Volume' (音量), Model 2 successfully generated a voice that sounds physically loud and projected (shouting style), which matches the user's intent to capture attention. Model 1, in contrast, spoke at a normal, moderate volume that failed to capture the 'loud' characteristic required by the prompt.
